description_long: This is a life-sized, realistic horse with a rich brown coat, black mane, and tail, and white markings on its lower legs and face. The musculature and contours of the body are well-defined, giving it a robust and healthy appearance. The mane is short and neatly trimmed, lying flat against the neck, while the tail is long and slightly wavy. The horse's head is proportionate, with expressive eyes and flared nostrils, and its ears are upright and alert. The hooves are solid and well-shaped, with a natural sheen. There is no visible tack or equipment, and the horse stands in a natural, relaxed posture.
description: A realistic brown horse with a black mane and tail, white lower legs, and a natural, healthy build. The horse stands alert with no visible tack or rider.
description_view_0: The rear view shows the horse's broad hindquarters, black tail, and muscular back legs.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the horse's strong body, short black mane, and white markings on the lower legs.
description_view_2: The front view displays the horse's face, upright ears, white facial marking, and symmetrical stance.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the brown coat, black mane and tail, and white lower legs.
attribute_pose: Standing square with a relaxed, alert posture.
attribute_mane_style: Short and neatly trimmed, lying flat against the neck.
attribute_leg_position: All four legs are on the ground, bearing weight evenly.
